hook: Attackers can intercept traffic when trust or routing is misconfigured.
cta: Combine certificate pinning awareness with network segmentation controls.

storyboardBeats.objective: Define man-in-the-middle risk on untrusted networks.
Attacker positions between client and intended server.
Traffic is decrypted or redirected through attacker-controlled proxy.
Certificate warnings and HSTS failures reveal suspicious paths.
Mutual TLS, pinning, and secure defaults reduce interception success.
